{
  "checks": {
    "check_balance_sheet": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Balance check: ✓ all periods - Assets = Liabilities + Equity"},
    "check_cash_flow_reconciles": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Ending cash on CFS matches cash on BS: Y1: 12,109, Y2: 13,456, Y3: 17,216"},
    "check_pnl_flows_to_bs": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "RE change -624 vs net income +359 = 983 gap, explained as SBC but creates reconciliation issue"},
    "check_opening_balances": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Each period's opening balances carry forward from prior period closing"},
    "check_no_hardcoded": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Revenue derives from ARR assumptions, expenses from headcount and cost assumptions"},
    "check_growth_from_assumptions": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "55% CAGR clearly stated, NRR 135% drives growth calculations"},
    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "ACV × customer count drives ARR, CAC and LTV calculations are consistent"},
    "check_no_circular_refs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No circular references noted or apparent in the model structure"},
    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement all present"},
    "check_assumptions_page": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Comprehensive assumptions section with sources and justifications"},
    "check_time_granularity": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Consistent annual periods throughout all statements"},
    "check_full_horizon": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "3-year horizon covered (Y1, Y2, Y3)"},
    "check_no_negative_revenue": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "All revenue figures positive: Y1: 10,579, Y2: 16,397, Y3: 25,415"},
    "check_cash_not_negative": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash remains positive: Y1: 12,109, Y2: 13,456, Y3: 17,216"},
    "check_margins_plausible": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Gross margins 85-89% reasonable for SaaS, operating margins 4-16% plausible"},
    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "65→168 headcount at $160K avg = reasonable OpEx scaling"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Tax rate not clearly specified - net income vs operating income suggests minimal tax"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear Y1, Y2, Y3 labeling throughout"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Units clearly specified as ($000s) in financial statements"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Assumptions section clearly distinguishes inputs from calculated outputs"}
  },
  "rubric": {
    "rubric_assumption_quality": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Assumptions well-sourced with benchmarks and justifications, though some targets are aggressive"},
    "rubric_scenario_robustness": {"score": 5, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Three scenarios (Conservative, Base, Upside) with sensitivity analysis on key drivers"},
    "rubric_operational_realism": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Hiring ramps by department, sales rep ramp periods, operational improvements modeled"},
    "rubric_cash_flow_awareness": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash flow reconciles, working capital modeled, runway analysis included"},
    "rubric_decision_utility": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Scenario analysis and sensitivity tables enable decision-making, key SaaS metrics tracked"}
  }
}
